change_impact_entries.reason: Added the role middleware alias needed for new portal route boundaries.
change_impact_entries.compatibility_note: Existing middleware behavior remains unchanged outside the new role alias.

change_impact_entries.reason: Attached additive RBAC and guardian/donor profile helpers to the existing single auth model.
change_impact_entries.compatibility_note: Auth flow, password handling, and admin approval semantics were not changed.

change_impact_entries.reason: Added additive donor-user linkage fields, casts, and relation support for future donor portal work.
change_impact_entries.compatibility_note: Legacy donor CRUD fields and naming remain intact.

change_impact_entries.reason: Added isolated role-protected portal route groups without changing any existing route names.
change_impact_entries.compatibility_note: All legacy management route names and definitions remain unchanged.

notes: No legacy transaction controller or reporting controller was modified.
Canonical posting safety was introduced as a new service rather than by rewriting legacy write paths.

change_impact_entries.reason: Registered the portal landing and management surface middleware aliases needed by the Phase 2 guardian portal.
change_impact_entries.compatibility_note: Existing role middleware remains intact; only the new additive aliases were added.

change_impact_entries.reason: Replaced the Phase 1 placeholder route with the real guardian dashboard, student, invoice, and history routes under the existing guardian namespace.
change_impact_entries.compatibility_note: The `/guardian` prefix and guardian route-name namespace remain unchanged.

change_impact_entries.reason: Added a narrow redirect and management-surface guard so guardian-only and donor-only users cannot reach legacy management pages while all existing route names remain stable.
change_impact_entries.compatibility_note: Unroled legacy users still retain their previous access during this phase to avoid breaking live management workflows before a later hardening/backfill step.

change_impact_entries.reason: Updated the stale Phase 1 guardian route assertion so it provisions the guardian profile now required by the real Phase 2 portal surface.
change_impact_entries.compatibility_note: The test still verifies role boundaries; it now matches the active guardian portal contract instead of the Phase 1 placeholder page.

notes: No legacy transaction controller, report controller, or shared navigation view was modified.
Guardian portal reads only from guardian links, student fee invoices, payments, and receipts added in Phase 1; it does not reuse legacy transaction posting paths.

change_impact_entries.reason: Replaced the Phase 1 placeholder donor route with the real donor dashboard, donation history, and receipt history routes under the existing donor namespace.
change_impact_entries.compatibility_note: The `/donor` prefix and donor route-name namespace remain unchanged, and legacy donor management routes under `/donors` were left intact.

change_impact_entries.reason: Updated the stale donor route assertion so it provisions the donor profile now required by the real Phase 3 portal surface.
change_impact_entries.compatibility_note: The test still verifies role boundaries; it now matches the active donor portal contract instead of the Phase 1 placeholder page.

notes: No legacy donor management controller, transaction posting controller, or reporting controller was modified.
Donor portal reads only from the linked donor profile, legacy donation ledger rows, and explicit user-bound receipt records; it does not introduce donor-side write flows or live gateway finalization.

change_impact_entries.reason: Added the new management-only reporting route and updated the management namespace copy to point operators toward the additive reporting surface.
change_impact_entries.compatibility_note: Existing `management.dashboard`, `management.access-control`, and all legacy `reports.*` routes remain unchanged.

notes: No legacy `ReportController`, `Reports/*` controller, dashboard controller, or shared navigation file was modified.
Management reporting remains additive under `/management/reporting` and documents its semantic separation from the existing legacy report totals.
